reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction. The tests perform literal string matching on implementation details (function names, regex patterns, exact return statements, exact .omit() arguments) rather than behavioral testing. This creates an irreconcilable conflict: the instruction must specify these exact strings for tests to pass (behavior_in_task_description), but doing so violates no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage. The test issues (solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, test_not_tautological, behavior_in_tests) are structural and cannot be fixed by editing instruction.md alone.
